---
title: "get_event_candlesticks"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_event_candlesticks()`

Get Event Candlesticks

## Usage

```r
get_event_candlesticks(
  event_ticker = NULL,
  series_ticker,
  date = NULL,
  period_interval = 60,
  start = NULL,
  end = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `event_ticker` | Character. The event ticker. If NULL, use series_ticker + date. |
| `series_ticker` | Character. The series ticker. |
| `date` | Date or character. The event date (used if event_ticker is NULL). |
| `period_interval` | Integer. Candle period in minutes: 1, 60, or 1440. |
| `start` | Date, character, or integer. Start date/timestamp. |
| `end` | Date, character, or integer. End date/timestamp. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with OHLC data.

## Description

Retrieves aggregated historical OHLC data across all markets in an event.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Using series + date
candles <- get_event_candlesticks(
  series_ticker = "KXHIGHNY",
  date = "2026-02-07",
  period_interval = 60
)

# Using full event ticker
candles <- get_event_candlesticks(
  event_ticker = "KXHIGHNY-26FEB07",
  series_ticker = "KXHIGHNY"
)

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other history: 
`get_event_results()`,
`get_market_history()`,
`get_series_history()`,
`get_settled_events()`,
`get_settled_markets()`,
`get_trade_history()`
